source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Arvo or Georgia for publishing headlines, Inter for product UI, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels and editorial metadata.
layout: Editorial 8px grids, black wing-bar dividers, warm paper panels, orange action states, leaf-green support states, compact publishing navigation, and clear content-density rhythm.

prompts.label: Transparent Oriole motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Oriole transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated oriole plumage motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A complete stylized-realistic oriole feather and wing-plumage cluster inspired by a Baltimore oriole: vivid orange breast and wing panels, glossy black head and wing bars, small white feather accents, subtle orchard leaf-green reflected tones, crisp feather layering, accurate bird-plumage texture, elegant publishing-system clarity.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show a compact bird-plumage silhouette with wing, tail feather hints, black mask/head profile cue, and orange body panels without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves orange plumage, glossy black markings, white accents, and fine feather texture.
Chroma-key background: create the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no flowers as main subject, no nest, no branch, no landscape, no second bird, no full orchard scene, no text, no watermark, no props.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Oriole light design-system board
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Oriole" / "Oriole Plumage", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible theme.
Visual identity: clear publishing system for an orchard canopy context, inspired by oriole plumage: vivid oriole orange, glossy black, leaf green, warm paper white, bark taupe, soft cream, pollen yellow, and deep canopy charcoal.
Required board content: readable palette swatches with token names, typography guidance for English and Japanese, layout rhythm, radius, spacing, border, shadow, texture samples, navigation, buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, dashboard charts, empty/error/loading states, sidebar preview, and sample article/editorial publishing screen.
Composition: polished high-resolution product design board, dense but legible, organized grid, large labels, no tiny unreadable token tables, crisp UI components. Use black wing-bar dividers, orange primary actions, leaf-green support states, warm paper surfaces, cream content panels, orchard-canopy texture, and precise editorial hierarchy.
Text constraints: use concise labels only; avoid misspellings; include the exact title "Morphous Oriole" and subtitle "Oriole Plumage Publishing System".
Exclusions: no generic purple gradients, no unrelated neon colors, no stock landing page, no random brands, no cropped unreadable UI, no muddy one-color palette, no extra animals beyond a subtle oriole motif reference.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Oriole dark design-system board
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Oriole" / "Oriole Plumage", translated from the same light publishing-system identity.
Visual identity: dark clear publishing system for an orchard canopy context, inspired by oriole plumage: deep canopy black, vivid oriole orange, leaf green, warm cream foreground, bark taupe, muted moss, pollen yellow, and charcoal paper panels.
Required board content: readable palette swatches with token names, typography guidance for English and Japanese, layout rhythm, radius, spacing, border, shadow, texture samples, navigation, buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, dashboard charts, empty/error/loading states, sidebar preview, and sample article/editorial publishing screen.
Composition: polished high-resolution product design board, dense but legible, organized grid, large labels, no tiny unreadable token tables, crisp UI components. Use black wing-bar dividers, orange primary actions, leaf-green support states, warm cream text, charcoal editorial panels, orchard-canopy dark texture, and precise publishing hierarchy.
Text constraints: use concise labels only; avoid misspellings; include the exact title "Morphous Oriole" and subtitle "Dark Oriole Publishing System".
Exclusions: no generic purple gradients, no unrelated neon colors, no stock landing page, no random brands, no cropped unreadable UI, no muddy one-color palette, no extra animals beyond a subtle oriole motif reference.
